message:
🌱 Reorder arcade: checkers, chess, sudoku as top cards (#287)

Move Kube Checkers, Kube Chess, and Kube Sudoku to the top of the
default arcade card list and the Full Arcade template. Also promote
checkers in the Arcade Classics template. Change high scores banner
text from "Local Storage" to "Saved Locally".

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
